nlm_freshness_policy.rule: Delete superseded harness sources and upload the newest version under the canonical title.

pre_spawn_checklist: Prompt gut check: restate track intent as explicit claims
CGC gut check: verify claim-to-code mapping for this track
NLM gut check: confirm harness dump is current
Sequential-thinking: plan closure order and implementation sequence
Skills attached: load all skills from required_skills
Exa check: attach Exa only if track involves external APIs/libraries
spawn_invariant.worker_directive: Complete ALL tasks in the plan. Do not stop at a proof slice. Follow workflow.md for the task lifecycle.
spawn_invariant.on_failure: Save progress to plan.md, report the failure point, re-spawn from next pending task.
